svg.text: IMPORTANT: FEDERAL AND STATE LAW REQUIRES DISCLOSURE OF THE VEHICLE MILEAGE UPON TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP. AN INACCURATE OR INCOMPLETE STATEMENT MAY SUBJECT YOU TO CRIMINAL AND/OR CIVIL PENALTIES.
The undersigned seller(s) certify that the described vehicle is transferred to the buyer(s) named below, subject to any liens noted herein.
THE ODOMETER NOW READS (NO TENTHS) MILES
[ ] Mileage in excess of mechanical limits [ ] Odometer reading is not actual mileage [ ] Exempt
The undersigned licensed dealer assigns and warrants title to the purchaser(s) below.
ODOMETER DISCLOSURE — The odometer now reads:
[ ] EXCEEDS MECHANICAL LIMITS [ ] ODOMETER DISCREPANCY [ ] EXEMPT
BUYER AND SELLER CERTIFY THEY HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.
The undersigned licensed dealer assigns and warrants title to the purchaser(s) below.
ODOMETER DISCLOSURE — The odometer now reads:
[ ] EXCEEDS MECHANICAL LIMITS [ ] ODOMETER DISCREPANCY [ ] EXEMPT
BUYER AND SELLER CERTIFY THEY HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.
I certify that I have physically examined the vehicle described herein and the VIN shown is the VIN assigned to the vehicle.
WARNING: ANY ALTERATION, FORGERY, OR FALSE STATEMENT ON THIS DOCUMENT IS A VIOLATION OF LAW AND MAY BE SUBJECT TO CRIMINAL PROSECUTION.
